Thanks for contributing to Pulse! Please fill out the sections below.
Use a Conventional Commits style PR title, e.g. "fix: correct category attribution".
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation / chore

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and/or added. -->

- [ ] `dotnet build` passes
- [ ] `dotnet test digital-wellbeing-app/Tests/Tests.csproj` passes
- [ ] Added/updated unit tests for the change
- [ ] Manually verified in the running app (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I ran `dotnet format`
- [ ] The build is warning-clean
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant
- [ ] I agree to license my contribution under GPL-3.0
